text:

Sorry for GIDs and UIds.

Her are the patchs :

220a221
> openerpd:*:951:


UIDs :

223a224
> openerpd:*:950:950::0:0:Openerpd user:/nonexistent:/sbin/nologin


It seems that print/py-reportlab2 only fail to create a package.
It does install well with ports.

Laurent
